# Pattaya Gym Directory
> The most comprehensive, independently-verified directory of gyms, Muay Thai camps, BJJ academies, golf courses, dive operators, watersports, climbing, yoga and sport venues in Pattaya, Thailand. 157 venues, 47 guides, 15 categories, 6 areas — no paid placements, source-cited research.

This llms.txt file provides AI agents and language-model crawlers with a curated map of the most useful, high-signal pages on pattaya-gym.com.

## Core directory

- [Home](https://pattaya-gym.com/): Full directory with search, filters, featured venues
- [Search](https://pattaya-gym.com/search/): Full-text search across all 157 venues
- [Map](https://pattaya-gym.com/map/): Stub page (noindex) — use [Search](https://pattaya-gym.com/search/) or area hubs meanwhile
- [Compare](https://pattaya-gym.com/compare/): Side-by-side comparison of any 2–4 venues
- [Plan My Trip](https://pattaya-gym.com/plan-my-trip/): Free trip builder - a tailored Pattaya training-trip plan by sport, length, budget and travel style
- [All sports](https://pattaya-gym.com/sports/): Hub linking all 15 sport categories

## Areas of Pattaya

- [Jomtien Beach](https://pattaya-gym.com/area/jomtien/): Beach-front gyms, dive operators, kitesurfing
- [Naklua / North Pattaya](https://pattaya-gym.com/area/naklua/): Quieter residential, yoga, fitness chains
- [Pratamnak Hill](https://pattaya-gym.com/area/pratamnak/): Densest fitness neighborhood, Muscle Factory, outdoor calisthenics
- [Central Pattaya](https://pattaya-gym.com/area/central-pattaya/): 24-hour gyms, hotel pools, walk-in Muay Thai
- [East Pattaya / Darkside](https://pattaya-gym.com/area/east-pattaya/): Mabprachan, equestrian, value-tier community gyms
- [Sattahip / Far South](https://pattaya-gym.com/area/sattahip/): Marinas, dive sites, waterparks

## Sport categories

- [Muay Thai camps](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/muay-thai/): 38 verified camps including Fairtex, Sityodtong, Kombat Group
- [Fitness / Gym](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/fitness/): 29 venues — 24-hour chains, hotel gyms, boutique
- [Golf](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/golf/): 17 courses including Siam Country Club, Laem Chabang, Phoenix Gold
- [Yoga / Pilates](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/yoga/): 14 studios
- [Tennis / Padel / Squash](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/racquet/): 11 venues
- [Watersports / Diving](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/watersports/): 20 dive operators + kitesurf + yacht clubs
- [Swimming](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/swimming/): 9 pools + waterparks
- [Climbing](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/climbing/): 2 climbing gyms
- [Running / Cycling Clubs](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/clubs/): 23 groups
- [Kids / Youth Sports](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/kids-youth/): 9 football academies + trampoline parks
- [Equestrian](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/equestrian/): 2 facilities including Thai Polo & Equestrian Club
- [Adventure / Multi-Sport](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/adventure/): 12 venues — skydiving, karts, ATV, ziplines
- [MMA](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/mma/): 1 verified MMA camp
- [BJJ / Grappling](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/bjj/): 1 verified BJJ academy
- [CrossFit / Functional](https://pattaya-gym.com/category/crossfit/): 1 affiliate

## Methodology + about

- [About this site](https://pattaya-gym.com/about/): Editorial principles, independence policy
- [Research methodology](https://pattaya-gym.com/methodology/): How venues are verified, sources, update cadence
- [Pattaya sport tourism stats](https://pattaya-gym.com/pattaya-sport-stats/): Authoritative numbers
- [Contact](https://pattaya-gym.com/contact/): Submit corrections, partnerships
- [Press](https://pattaya-gym.com/press/): Press kit, citations, media inquiries

## Data feeds (machine-readable)

- [Compare venue JSON](https://pattaya-gym.com/data/compare-venues.json): Slim venue summaries for /compare/
- [Plan trip venue JSON](https://pattaya-gym.com/data/plan-venues.json): Tags for /plan-my-trip/
- [Status / catalog metrics](https://pattaya-gym.com/status.json): Venue counts, schema completeness, build version
- [Master sitemap](https://pattaya-gym.com/sitemap.xml)
- [RSS — recently added](https://pattaya-gym.com/feed.xml)
- [Category RSS feeds](https://pattaya-gym.com/feed/): Per-category /feed/<category>.xml
- [Area RSS feeds](https://pattaya-gym.com/feed/area/): Per-area /feed/area/<slug>.xml

## Example AI queries

- "Find beginner-friendly Muay Thai gyms in Pattaya with English-speaking coaches."
- "Compare golf courses near Pattaya by travel time, prestige, and visitor suitability."
- "Which Pattaya gyms are best for digital nomads staying near Jomtien or Pratamnak?"
- "Plan a family-friendly Pattaya sport itinerary with pools, youth football, and indoor activities."

## Editorial promise

Every listing on pattaya-gym.com is researched and source-cited from public information.
No paid placements, no sponsored listings, no affiliate-only entries.
Independent directory operated since 2026. Built and maintained in Pattaya, Thailand.
Coordinates: 12.93°N, 100.88°E.

Last update: 2026-07-01
